name: 标点与拼写
subject: english
domain_name: 语言运用 / Language Use / Language Use
curriculum_points: Candidates will be assessed on their ability to: W1 articulate experience and express what is thought, felt and imagined
Candidates will be assessed on their ability to: W2 organise and structure ideas and opinions for deliberate effect
Candidates will be assessed on their ability to: W3 use a range of vocabulary and sentence structures appropriate to context
Candidates will be assessed on their ability to: W4 use register appropriate to context
